scripts.test: node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' --test
scripts.test-only: node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' --test --test-only
